name: io.github.charlie-morrison/indie-founder-mcp
description: Aggregates Lemon Squeezy, Gumroad, Polar, and Stripe revenue into one Claude-queryable view.
title: Indie Founder Revenue MCP

environmentVariables.name: LS_API_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Lemon Squeezy API token (https://app.lemonsqueezy.com/settings/api). Enables the LS adapter.

environmentVariables.name: LS_STORE_ID
environmentVariables.description: Optional Lemon Squeezy store ID filter.

environmentVariables.name: GUMROAD_ACCESS_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Gumroad OAuth access token (https://gumroad.com/settings/advanced). Enables the Gumroad adapter.

environmentVariables.name: POLAR_API_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Polar.sh API token (https://polar.sh/settings/tokens). Enables the Polar adapter.

environmentVariables.name: STRIPE_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Stripe secret API key (https://dashboard.stripe.com/apikeys). Enables the Stripe adapter.

environmentVariables.name: INDIE_FOUNDER_MCP_LICENSE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Lemon Squeezy license key for the paid tier (top_customers, refund_signal, export_csv_for_tax). Free tools (summary_mrr, recent_orders, health) work without it. Buy at https://charliemorrison.lemonsqueezy.com.
